title: Add a team comment feature
excerpt:

posts.author: Pogley (Ant Clifford)
posts.cookedHtml:
We often use comments as a way to collaborate on things like briefs, checklists, etc.
It is frustrating because we can’t collaborate on this and have to copy what the last person has done and create a new comment, or reply to a comment.
A new feature request would be a “Team Comment” which allows anyone in your team to edit that comment and make changes.
We would love that feature!
Thank you.
